speaker_notes:
- Use the GitHub example heavily here.
- Talk about creating issues, editing text and tags, and moving tasks on boards together.
- The emotional point is how much more complete and engaging that experience becomes.

kicker.value: assistants can help us interact with software

main_statement.value: The dominant interface may become your own agent.

point_1.value: Built-in website assistants have tools, but not your full context.

point_2.value: Your assistant knows everything about your current task at hand.

point_3.value: Imagine if your assistant was given tools and instructions to interact with the website.

point_4.value: You and the assistant can work on the same surface.
